steps.notes: Spine architecture doc written: 12 components across 6 layers (lifecycle, work tracking, shared awareness, safety, interaction, configuration). Data flow documented, integration map, gate registry summary, 7 active concerns cataloged, performance benchmarks.

Reviewed: accurate and thorough. 12 components, 6 layers, integration map. Key gap flagged: 209 rules/18 enforced matches Jeff's CLAUDE.md-as-optional-rules concern. Needs update for DEC-039 (board consolidation) and DEC-040 (vertebra ownership).
